ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Drama, Comedy, Action) */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "revenue_millions" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie in millions */,
  "metascore" INTEGER /* Metascore of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_image" TEXT /* Poster image of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* Filmography of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* Filmography of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authentication" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text written by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "is_critic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the rating is from a critic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_analytics" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the movie */,
  "watch_time" INTEGER /* Total watch time for the movie */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement metrics for the movie (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., JSON or CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: Genre of the movie (e.g., Drama, Comedy, Action)
ID of the director of the movie
Runtime of the movie in minutes
Revenue generated by the movie in millions
ID of the movie being rated
ID of the user giving the rating
